claims_allowed.description: Per-class pixel counts and relative frequencies for each labelled scene
Class imbalance Gini coefficient per scene
Per-class mean and std spectra plus percentiles 5/25/50/75/95
Pairwise spectral cosine and SAM (radians) between class mean spectra
Per-band Fisher ratio, ANOVA F-statistic with p-value, and mutual information vs label
Silhouette score (cosine) using ground-truth labels as cluster ids
K used for the canonical LDA fit per scene
Mean theta over the corpus (LDAvis-faithful disc area)
Top-N words per topic ranked by relevance(lambda) using the actual corpus marginal P(w)
Pairwise cosine, Jensen-Shannon, Hellinger, and top-15 word Jaccard between topics
LDAvis-faithful 2D MDS on the Jensen-Shannon distance between phi rows
3D MDS on Jensen-Shannon — the rotatable inter-topic map the spec requires
log(P(w|topic_i)/P(w|topic_j)) ranked tokens for every ordered topic pair
Held-out perplexity of the canonical LDA fit
Posterior label distribution among documents whose dominant topic is k (and the strict variant theta_k > 0.5)
KL divergence between P(label|topic) and the empirical label prior, per topic
Top-50 documents by theta_k for every topic with their full theta vector and label
H x W per-pixel argmax(theta) sentinel-uint8 map (255 = unlabelled / not sampled)
PCA 2D and 3D coordinates of theta per document (sampled to 2k), coloured by label / dominant topic / confidence
Sampled spectra binary (float32) plus per-document metadata for thousands-of-spectra rendering
Precomputed band x reflectance density heatmaps overall, per label, and per dominant topic
Document count, vocabulary size, document-length quartiles, zero-token-doc rate
Hungarian-matched cosine and top-15 word Jaccard between LDA fits across 3 seeds
ARI/NMI of K-means(theta) vs label, plus 5-fold logistic regression macro F1 on theta
Per-subset HIDSAG measurement EDA: numeric variable distributions, Pearson and Spearman correlation matrices, dominant targets, modality band counts
Top-5 USGS / AVIRIS spectral-library samples per topic by cosine and SAM, plus the full topic x library distance matrices
Moran's I of dominant-topic map, connected-component sizes per topic, and best-IoU label for each topic

V1, V2, V3 recipes (V3 = band-bin ordered, the previously-missing Procemin recipe) at 3 quantization schemes (uniform, quantile, lloyd_max) x 3 Q values (8, 16, 32). Per-config vocab stats, document-length distribution, zero-token-doc rate, corpus-marginal entropy bits, top-20 tokens.

Alternative document constructors per scene: pixel baseline, SLIC at 500 / 2000 superpixels, fixed patches at 7 / 15 px, Felzenszwalb graph segmentation. Per-method group sizes, per-group mean spectra, between/within variance ratio, ARI / NMI / V-measure vs ground-truth label.

Pairwise ARI / NMI / V-measure matrix between every grouping method (label, dominant LDA topic, every method from build_groupings) per scene. Quantifies how different ways of grouping spectra agree or disagree.

rule: Any number rendered by the web app must trace to one of these claims_allowed entries; anything else is forbidden in the UI.
